name: Killers Golf
address: 400 W Nolana Ave Suite A3, McAllen, TX 78501
about: Killers Golf is McAllen's first indoor Trackman golf club and sports bar. The venue features 130 top-rated golf courses worldwide, accessible through advanced simulator technology. It combines a high-tech golfing experience with a full-service sports bar, offering golfers of all ages the opportunity to play, practice, or socialize. The facility is equipped with Trackman technology for precise swing analysis and metrics, complemented by a bar menu with hot food, cold drinks, and live sporting events broadcast on ten large screen TVs throughout the club.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 130+ top-rated golf courses worldwide
Advanced Trackman technology for precise swing analysis and metrics
Family-friendly environment with full bar and sports viewing options

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar with cold drinks available; BYOB not mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced dual radar and camera system for precise tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Not specified - it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience, though rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue offers a full bar and kitchen on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For groups of 3 or less, it takes approximately 3 to 4 hours to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Killers Golf is family-friendly and welcomes golfers of all ages, including children.
